quotes.speaker: Dave Valentin
quotes.text: Yeah he played on some of the records, great, great, great, great man. In fact we just did that remake for the “West Side Story” also, where it was just piano and flute. And we did “I Feel Pretty” but with a whole new twist to it, which eventually had an Afro-Cuban thing but in seven-four. So it’s [scats]. And we did it at Carnegie Hall, we did that. And there’s a lull just before he starts his piano solo and he’s ready to go, and people start applauding. And they’re applauding, they’re applauding. So Dave gets up and says “the © Fillius Jazz Archive -11-
quotes.caption: Dave Valentin recalls playing West Side Story at Carnegie Hall
quotes.doc_title: Dave Valentin interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 15, 2000
